title: fix(kube): gate SELinux volume warning note on host SELinux state
body:
### Description
This pull request addresses issue #17743 by optimizing the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of the volume permissions warning comment rendered during `podman kube generate`.

Following automated architectural reviews, the gating mechanism has been robustly refined to couple both host platform parameters and execution contexts seamlessly.

### Changes Introduced
- **Precision Logical Gating:** Isolated the warning rendering engine inside `pkg/domain/infra/abi/generate.go` into a dedicated package-level evaluator helper (`shouldWarnSELinuxVolumes()`).
- **Contextual Alignment:** The comment now fires if and only if:
  1. Volumes are declared in the spec (`len(po.Spec.Volumes) != 0`).
  2. The host kernel has active SELinux infrastructure (`selinux.GetEnabled()`).
  3. The container engine execution context is unprivileged (`rootless.IsRootless()`).
  This fully eliminates noise on non-SELinux setups (Ubuntu, Arch, Alpine, FreeBSD) and ensures accurate behavior on rootful Linux deployments.
- **Zero-Dependency Seam Architecture:** Leveraged overridable package variables (`selinuxGetEnabled` / `rootlessIsRootless`) to avoid platform-level side effects or runtime overrides during standard package testing blocks.

---

### Verification Matrix

#### 1. Native Regression Test Execution
Added a permanent, table-driven validation matrix inside `pkg/domain/infra/abi/generate_test.go` covering all platform permutations:

```bash
# Running isolated regression suite
go test -run TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes -v
=== RUN   TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes
=== RUN   TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes/SELinux_Enabled_+_Rootless_(Expected_Warning)
=== RUN   TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes/SELinux_Enabled_+_Rootful_(Suppress_Warning)
=== RUN   TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes/SELinux_Disabled_+_Rootless_(Suppress_Warning)
=== RUN   TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes/SELinux_Disabled_+_Rootful_(Suppress_Warning)
--- PASS: TestShouldWarnSELinuxVolumes (0.00s)
PASS
ok  	go.podman.io/podman/v6/pkg/domain/infra/abi	0.015s
